drivers.notes: 7" Unibody cone with Gen3 Active Ridge Technology (ART) surround

description.en: Three-way Founder floorstander — AL-MAC ceramic tweeter, AL-MAG midrange and three 177 mm CARBON-X Unibody woofers with Gen3 ART surround in a faceted ported cabinet with Cascade-Fusion bracing and shock-mount isolation. Crossovers at 500 Hz / 2.1 kHz.
description.es: Floorstander Founder de tres vías — tweeter cerámico AL-MAC, midrange AL-MAG y tres woofers CARBON-X Unibody de 177 mm con suspensión ART Gen3, en gabinete facetado con puerto, refuerzo Cascade-Fusion y aislación shock-mount. Crossovers a 500 Hz / 2,1 kHz.
